title: Boards + timelines
excerpt: Is there a way to combine all boards to show a total progress

posts.author: SEMQLD (SEM)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to combine all boards to show a total progress

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! Absolutely!

To do this, you will want to add a Dashboard to your monday account and then select all your boards in the Dashboard settings so you can see all their data.

You can utilize the different widgets like the Chart Widget, Battery Widget, or Numbers Widget to visually show data from across your boards.

Let me know what you think! I hope this helps!
